name: tuhin
description: Tuhin's dev identity as a plugin: Laravel task workflow (board, manager/backend/frontend/reviewer agents, plan checkpoints, worktrees, Pint/Pest gates, draft PRs, human merge) plus personal engineering skills (blast-radius, red-first, brutal-qa, vsa, readability-sweep, and more), a full SDLC pipeline (requirements → architecture → system models → task breakdown → design → Next.js/Laravel generators) and the tuhin digital-twin implementation agent. Pairs with Laravel Boost: Boost owns knowledge, this plugin owns process.
